title: calceolaria melissifolia subsp. pseudoscabra
intro: Calceolaria melissifolia subsp. pseudoscabra, also known as the false-toothed or yellow slipper, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Calceolaria genus. It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative effects. The herbal preparations of Calceolaria melissifolia subsp. pseudoscabra are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
